$comment: Registry of directories containing nested git repos of external products
cloned into this repo for source-level comparative research.
default_consumers: files that receive exclusion entries when a directory
is registered. Only .gitignore is safe for string-append editing.
myst.yml is structured YAML — maintain its exclude section manually.
managed_by: script path that manages this registry (ADR-26046).
Copied to each entry when registered.
Sourced by tools/scripts/paths.py at import time — all registered dirs
become part of VALIDATION_EXCLUDE_DIRS (git hooks, link checks, jupytext).

entries.description: Source code of external AI coding agents for comparative study
External AI infrastructure projects cloned for source-level research
